declarations.description: Idiomatic Lit `<rozie-tip-tap>` — a cross-framework rich-text editor compiled from one Rozie source wrapping TipTap (ProseMirror). Two-way `html` (with an `html-change` event), a batteries-included toolbar (or the `toolbar` slot), node-view slots, and an imperative command handle.
declarations.name: TipTap

members.name: html
members.description: The editor's document content as an HTML string — the sole `model: true` prop (two-way `r-model`). Typing writes the new HTML back through the model path (TipTap's `onUpdate`); a consumer write reflects into the live document, echo-guarded so a programmatic set does not reset the selection or re-emit `update`.

members.name: editable
members.description: Whether the document is editable. Toggling it calls TipTap's `setEditable` with `emitUpdate: false` (no spurious `update`). When `false`, the internal toolbar is hidden and the wrapper gets an `is-readonly` class.

members.name: placeholder
members.description: Placeholder text, forwarded to the editor host as `data-placeholder` + `aria-placeholder` and painted as ghost text on the first empty node via the bundled Placeholder extension. An empty string adds no placeholder.

members.name: autofocus
members.description: Whether to place the caret in the document on mount (TipTap's `autofocus` option).

members.name: editorClass
members.description: A CSS class applied to the contenteditable element (`editorProps.attributes.class`).

members.name: ariaLabel
members.description: The accessible name (`aria-label`) applied to the contenteditable element.

members.name: editorProps
members.description: ProseMirror `editorProps` passthrough — `handleKeyDown`, `handlePaste`, a custom `attributes`, etc. Spread **last** so consumer `editorProps` win the wrapper's attribute defaults.

members.name: extensions
members.description: Extra TipTap extensions composed onto `StarterKit` — the consumer-extensibility passthrough (Link, Image, Mention, custom nodes/marks, …). Consumer extensions genuinely win for a StarterKit-bundled node or mark: a same-named custom extension (e.g. a custom `Link`) auto-disables the corresponding StarterKit key (unless explicitly configured via `starterKit`), and the final extension array is name-deduped keeping the last (consumer) occurrence — so a custom Link/Underline/OrderedList replaces StarterKit's without a "Duplicate extension names" warning.

members.name: starterKit
members.description: StarterKit config passthrough — spread into `StarterKit.configure(...)`. Accepts per-extension option objects or `false` to disable an extension, e.g. `{ heading:false }`, `{ heading:{ levels:[1,2] } }`, `{ link:false }`. A StarterKit-bundled node/mark is auto-disabled when a same-named custom extension is supplied via `extensions`; an explicitly-set key here is always respected and never overridden by that auto-disable scan.

members.name: nodeSpecs
members.description: Custom ProseMirror node registration for the reactive `nodeView` portal slot — general facility, read ONCE at mount (setup-once construction, not reactive). Each entry: `{ name, tag, group, inline, atom, content, selectable, defining, attrs }` — `name` (required, unique node name), `tag` (required, parseHTML selector string | string[]), `group` (default `'block'`), `inline` (default `false`), `atom` (default `false` — no contentDOM), `content` (e.g. `'inline*'`; presence ⇒ the node gets an editable contentDOM), `selectable` (default `true`), `defining` (default `false`), `attrs` (`{ key: { default } }`, ProseMirror `addAttributes` shape). One `Node.create` is built per entry; all render through the SAME `nodeView` fragment, which dispatches on `scope.node.type.name`. An empty array (default) registers no custom nodes — zero overhead.

members.name: uploadImage
members.description: An async image-upload hook, signature `(file: File) => Promise<string>` resolving to a URL. When provided, the (otherwise-absent) Image extension is registered AND pasting/dropping an image file uploads it via this function then inserts the resolved URL at the caret / drop position. When `null` (default), the Image extension is absent and paste/drop are unchanged — zero overhead. The wrapper's paste/drop handling is a fallback: a consumer-supplied `editorProps.handlePaste` / `handleDrop` still wins.

members.name: getEditor
members.description: Return the underlying TipTap `Editor` instance for direct API access (commands, state, schema, extension storage).

members.name: focusEditor
members.description: Focus the editor — place the caret in the document.

members.name: blurEditor
members.description: Blur the editor — remove focus from the document.

members.name: getHTML
members.description: Return the current document serialized as an HTML string.

members.name: getJSON
members.description: Return the current document as a ProseMirror JSON object (`JSONContent`).

members.name: getText
members.description: Return the current document as a plain-text string (word/char counts, search indexing, plaintext export).

members.name: setContent
members.description: Replace the document content — `setContent(html)`. Echo-guarded: reflects into the bound `html` model without bouncing an extra `update`.

members.name: clearContent
members.description: Clear the document to an empty paragraph (reflects the empty value into the bound `html` model).

members.name: toggleBold
members.description: Toggle bold on the current selection.

members.name: toggleItalic
members.description: Toggle italic on the current selection.

members.name: toggleHeading
members.description: Toggle a heading at the given level — `toggleHeading(level)` (defaults to 1).

members.name: toggleBulletList
members.description: Toggle a bullet list at the current selection.

members.name: toggleUnderline
members.description: Toggle underline on the current selection.

members.name: toggleOrderedList
members.description: Toggle an ordered (numbered) list at the current selection.

members.name: undo
members.description: Undo the last change.

members.name: redo
members.description: Redo the last undone change.

members.name: chain
members.description: Return a focused TipTap command chain for composing commands — e.g. `chain().toggleBold().toggleItalic().run()` (null before mount).

members.name: isActive
members.description: Whether a mark/node is active in the current selection — `isActive(name, attrs?)` (e.g. `isActive("heading", { level: 2 })`). Drives custom-toolbar active styling. False before mount.

members.name: can
members.description: Return the command-availability chain — `can().chain().focus().toggleBold().run()` returns a boolean — for enabling/disabling custom-toolbar buttons. null before mount.

members.name: isEmpty
members.description: Whether the document is empty — drives empty-state UI and submit-gating. true before mount.

events.name: html-change
events.description: Fired with the updated `html` (`event.detail`) when it changes.

slots.name: nodeView
slots.description: Scoped slot — props: node, selected, updateAttributes, getPos, editor, contentDOM.
